justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's request for an appointment "tomorrow in the afternoon between 14 and 16" and found a slot within that timeframe.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent successfully found and offered an available slot that perfectly matched the user's requested time window, so no negotiation was needed.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently processed all the user's information in a single turn and booked the appointment without any unnecessary questions or turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly understanding the request and confirming the booking.
